name: codebase-impact terminates a detector that exceeds --per-rule-timeout-seconds and records timeout=true
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codebase-impact.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --root "$PWD/tree" --per-rule-timeout-seconds 1 --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -E "\"timeout\":true" impact.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: slow
    name: slow
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "sleep 10"
' > rule.yaml
